summary: CHARACTER CREATION All Attributes start with minimum value

mechanics.name_guess: CHARACTER CREATION All Attributes start with minimum value
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 024 > lore > CHARACTER CREATION All Attributes start with minimum value
mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER CREATION All Attributes start with minimum value of 2 except for Social Standing_ which has minimum of This minimum can be raised by the character affiliation and Life Path; Use the highest minimum listed for the Attribute; if subsequent path assigns lower minimum than one you already have disregard it, An exception to this rule is the Social Standing minimum for Clan characters see Attribute minimums can never be lower than higher tnan 8. Also Attribute minimums only apply during character creation. After play starts these minimums are irrelevant.
